items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique. After our discovery call, I'll provide a clear and detailed quote with no surprises. My rates are adapted to SMB realities.

items.question: What's the typical timeline?
items.answer: A working prototype is usually ready in 2 to 4 weeks. The full project depends on complexity, but I always prioritize short cycles and frequent deliverables.

items.question: I know nothing about AI, is that a problem?
items.answer: Not at all! That's exactly my role — to translate your business needs into technical solutions. You bring your business expertise, I handle the AI part.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: I work with the latest models (GPT, Claude, Gemini) and modern stacks (React, Node.js, Python, Supabase). I choose the best technology for each project.

seo.title: About — 5PennyAi
seo.description: Christian Couillard, founder of 5PennyAi. 20+ years of IT experience, passionate AI developer based in Québec.

hero.title: AI in service of your business.
hero.subtitle: Behind 5PennyAi, a passionate developer with 20+ years of IT experience.

story.section1_p1: My academic path reflects broad curiosity: philosophy, computer science, bioinformatics, and data science. I've always enjoyed exploring multiple fields in depth, because good ideas often emerge at the intersection of disciplines. That drive to learn is still active today — I spend part of my time experimenting with the latest AI tools and documenting what I learn on this site.
story.section1_p2: For more than 20 years, I've shipped software in demanding environments — public health (INSPQ, CHU de Québec), justice (Quebec Ministry of Justice), government, institutional (Russell Investments, CGI). That delivery discipline is what sets my applied generative-AI practice apart today: I don't just prototype, I ship to production.
story.section2_p1: Today, I design and ship AI products end-to-end — analysis, architecture, development, deployment. RAG, agents, multi-LLM orchestration, process automation.
story.section2_p2: 5pennyai.com is my personal lab: where I experiment, publish what I learn, and document the projects I build. PennySEO (AI SEO optimization SaaS) and the automated editorial pipeline that powers this site are my two main case studies — see the Portfolio section for the technical details.

hero.title: PennySEO
hero.subtitle: SaaS SEO optimization platform for Etsy sellers, powered by Vision AI and NLP.

challenge.title: The challenge
challenge.text: Etsy sellers spend hours manually optimizing their product listings for SEO, with no guarantee of results.

solution.title: The solution
solution.text: A SaaS that turns a simple product photo into an optimized SEO listing using Vision AI and NLP.

items.caption: Main dashboard — SEO pipeline overview with performance metrics and shop health score.
Keyword table — Scoring by purchase intent, search volume, trend, and competition.
Favorites bank — Filtering by category (Gems, Trending, High Volume, Low Competition) and presets.

cta.title: Got a similar project in mind?
cta.subtitle: Drop me a line — I'm open to a role or a consulting engagement.

seo.title: Automated editorial pipeline — Christian Couillard
seo.description: Case study: end-to-end pipeline generating SEO-optimized articles. 3 orchestrated LLMs (Perplexity, Claude, Gemini Image), custom skill, running in production on 5pennyai.com.

hero.title: Automated editorial pipeline
hero.subtitle: Multimodal AI content generation — research, writing and illustration in an orchestrated pipeline.

challenge.title: The challenge
challenge.text: Running a quality technical blog takes hours of research, writing and illustration. How do you automate the entire flow without sacrificing editorial quality?

solution.title: The solution
solution.text: A pipeline orchestrating three cascading LLMs: Perplexity explores the live web to validate topics and find sources, Claude writes structured articles through a custom skill calibrated for SEO quality, and Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (NanoBanana) generates illustrations and infographics. Result: time-to-publish divided by 5 to 10.

items.title: Research & SEO validation
items.description: Topics are validated through real-time web search. SEO score is computed to prioritize the angles with the highest potential.

items.title: Structured writing
items.description: The custom Claude skill generates a full article with H1/H2/H3 structure, hook intro, cited sources, and CTAs aligned with SEO guidelines.

items.title: Multimodal illustration
items.description: NanoBanana generates hero image + infographics consistent with the brand identity. Automatic iterations until the output is satisfactory.

generator.title: Generate with AI
generator.subtitle: Describe your topic and let AI draft a bilingual article you can review.
generator.topicPlaceholder: Ex: What is an LLM? How does image diffusion work? GPT-5 just dropped...
generator.instructionsPlaceholder: Extra guidance, specific angle, keywords to include…
generator.loadingHint: Takes 1 to 3 minutes. The AI researches first, then writes the full article in both French and English.
generator.error: Generation failed. Retry or write it manually.
generator.errorTimeout: The generation timed out. Try again in a moment.
generator.replaceHint: The slug, publish date and cover image will be preserved.
generator.pasteFormatError: The clipboard content doesn't match the Topic Finder format. Use the 'Copy for blog' button in Topic Finder.
generator.researchNotUsed: Article generated without web research (Perplexity unavailable)

search.placeholder: Ex: How can AI reduce administrative tasks in an SME?

seo.unavailable: SEO data is not available for this search. Topics are shown without volume/difficulty scores.

bank.title: Topic bank
bank.emptySubtitle: Run a search and save the topics that interest you.
bank.confirmRemove: Remove this topic from the bank?

diagram.title: Generate a diagram
diagram.subtitle: AI analyzes your article and creates a diagram illustrating the main concept.
diagram.previewSubtitle: Preview and insert into the article, or regenerate with different parameters.
diagram.instructionsPlaceholder: Ex: focus on steps 1 to 3, use simple icons…
diagram.insertAtEnd: At the end of the article
diagram.loadingHint: Takes 20 to 40 seconds. AI designs the diagram, then the browser renders it to an image.
diagram.error: Generation failed. Try again in a moment.
diagram.minContent: Add at least 100 characters of content to enable generation.
diagram.bilingualHint: Two diagrams will be generated (FR + EN) in parallel.
diagram.singleHint: One diagram in {{lang}} will be generated (the other language has too little content).

infographic.title: Generate an infographic
infographic.subtitle: Claude drafts an optimized prompt from your article, then Nano Banana produces a bilingual flat-vector infographic.
infographic.previewSubtitle: Preview the FR and EN versions, regenerate for variety, or insert into the article.
infographic.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g. emphasize the 3 key stats, use a minimalist tone…
infographic.loadingHint: Takes 30 to 80 seconds. Claude drafts the prompt, then Gemini paints both languages in parallel.
infographic.error: Generation failed. Try again in a moment.
infographic.errorTimeout: Generation timed out (over 3 min). Try again.
infographic.minContent: Both versions (FR + EN) must have at least 100 characters — the infographic embeds text in each language.
infographic.bilingualHint: Two images will be generated (FR + EN) with text embedded in each language.

visualAssets.title: Visual assets
visualAssets.subtitle: Cover image, generated editorial header, infographics and diagrams — all grouped here.
visualAssets.coverHint: Used if no editorial header image is generated below. PNG, JPG, max 2 MB.
visualAssets.minContent: Write at least 100 characters in both FR and EN to unlock the generators.

header.title: Editorial header image
header.subtitle: Claude analyzes the article, defines a specific tech-forward visual thesis, then Nano Banana paints a bilingual 16:9 banner.
header.previewSubtitle: Preview FR and EN, regenerate, or save to replace the current images.
header.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g. dark background, more tech-forward, visualize the pipeline instead of objects…
header.minContent: Both versions (FR + EN) must have at least 100 characters — the header embeds the title and subtitle in each language.
header.bilingualHint: Two 16:9 images will be generated (FR + EN) with text embedded in each language.
header.loadingHint: 30 to 80 seconds. Claude picks the category, Nano Banana paints both languages.
loadingMessages: Nano Banana painting the French version…
Nano Banana painting the English version…
